top_signals.title: Houthis claim strikes on Saudi Arabian oil tankers as Rubio says Iran not ready to make a deal
top_signals.summary: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi Arabian oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks slip; Segro shares jump on takeover
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM FTSE 100 liveblog. Easyjet is set to update the markets the day after its stock took a dive as its takeover was thrown into doubt. Easyjet dropped nearly 11 per cent on Wednesday afternoon, to 593p, after reports that the EU is preparing to review its rules on foreign [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Check Point warns of SmartConsole zero-day exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Israeli cybersecurity firm Check Point Software has addressed an actively exploited zero-day flaw in the company's SmartConsole graphical user interface (GUI) admin panel. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Seven-Eleven Japan warns stores over unauthorized character item resale
top_signals.summary: There were reportedly cases where owners and employees bought up or set aside such products before putting them on store shelves and reselling them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BitMEX to shut down after 11 years in crypto derivatives
top_signals.summary: BitMEX announced it will shut down operations on Sept. 23, 2026, after owner HDR Global Trading Limited decided to close the crypto exchange.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South Korea discloses data breach impacting diplomats worldwide
top_signals.summary: South Korea disclosed that hackers breached the National Diplomatic Academy's online education system for ten months and stole personal information belonging to current and former employees of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA), including overseas diplomats. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Public housing completed in Ishikawa for Noto quake victims
top_signals.summary: This is the first time that construction of public housing units for victims of the January 2024 earthquake has been completed in the prefecture.
